name_en: 🌸❄️Chanel Gabrielle Chanel's innovation never disappoints. By integrating power and elegant design aesthetics into the original beauty, this Chanel Gabrielle Travel Bag was born 💯. It first appeared at the 2017 Spring/Summer Haute Couture show, and its presence has been everywhere at the recent fashion week. Delicate and soft bag body with hard and structured bottom fully embodies Mademoiselle Chanel's pursuit of freedom and comfort. size:28cm
